Early learning that feels close, practical, and kind.

LearningBirds helps Kita teams and parents support children with simple course paths, shared language, and warm guidance that fits into everyday life.

Start with LearningBirds

Choose the path that fits you. We will follow up with the right next step.

Kitas Bring LearningBirds to your staff and parent community. Parents Get practical ideas for supporting your child at home.

We will only use your details to follow up about LearningBirds.

One gentle learning bridge between Kita and home.

LearningBirds gives adults around a child practical tools they can actually use during busy weeks.

Shared guidance

Kitas and parents can work from the same clear ideas, making support feel more consistent for children.

Short courses

Focused modules turn big early-learning topics into small steps for staff meetings, handovers, and home routines.

Simple access

Parents can join directly, while Kitas can offer LearningBirds as part of their own communication and learning culture.

Warm and professional

The experience is designed to feel trustworthy for leaders, approachable for families, and respectful of childhood.

For Kitas: support your team and strengthen parent trust.

LearningBirds gives Kita leadership a calm way to introduce learning paths for educators and families.

Partner setup

Tell us about your Kita, your team, and the topics families ask about most often.

Learning paths

Choose course themes for educators, parents, or both, with a rollout that fits your communication rhythm.

Community launch

Invite staff and families into a shared learning space with practical prompts they can use right away.

Small moments at home can become powerful learning moments when parents know what to try.
LearningBirds for families
Parent-friendly ideas Simple language, practical examples, and short lessons make early-learning support easier to start.
Home routines Use everyday moments like reading, meals, play, and transitions to build confidence and connection.
Shared vocabulary Learn words and approaches that make conversations with educators clearer and more constructive.
Gentle next steps Get guided course suggestions based on your child's age, interests, and what you want to support.

Course themes for Kita and home.

Pick a path as a Kita partner or join as a parent. Each theme turns early learning into practical daily actions.

Inclusion

Belonging in everyday moments

Small adjustments that help children participate confidently in play, routines, and group life.
